summary: Project involves managing draft and live site versions, with the current goal of building the draft as an exact copy of the live site (Version 145).
architectural_notes: Draft and live are separate environments; draft must be explicitly synced from live files to ensure a 1:1 copy.
known_issues: Draft version diverged from live (Version 145); previous restore attempts did not fully capture all files/components.

new_feature_requests.summary: Restore all frontend source files to their exact Version 145 (live) state. This includes all pages (HomePage, AboutPage, CouplesPage, MenPage, WomenPage, PricingPage, ContactPage, LegalPage, BaselCouplesLandingPage, ZurichCouplesLandingPage), all layout and shared components (Layout.tsx, CalendlyInlineWidget.tsx), all hooks, utilities, configuration files (tailwind.config.js, index.css, App.tsx), and any other frontend files that exist in the live version. No file should differ from the live production version.

Restore the backend (backend/main.mo) to its exact Version 145 (live) state, ensuring all data types, CRUD operations, role-based access control, pricing entries, collections, navigation, and user profile logic are identical to the live version.
